{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",

  "4:LEN": {

      "1:VARINT": 2575,
      "2:VARINT": 5555,
      "3:VARINT": 2980,
      "4:LEN": "        c2s_frames = _parse_frames(c2s_bytes[PREFACE_LEN:], base_offset=PREFACE_LEN)\r\n        s2c_frames = _parse_frames(s2c_bytes, base_offset=0)\r\n        request_by_stream: dict[int, dict[str, Any]] = {}\r\n        response_by_stream: dict[int, dict[str, Any]] = {}\r\n        bytes_c2s_by_stream: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        bytes_s2c_by_stream: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        for stream_id, ft, frame, offset in c2s_frames:\r\n            if ft == FRAME_HEADERS and stream_id != 0:\r\n                block = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                headers = _decode_header_block(block)\r\n                if \":method\" in headers or \"method\" in headers:\r\n                    request_by_stream[stream_id] = {\r\n                        \"offset\": offset,\r\n                        \"method\": headers.get(\":method\") or headers.get(\"method\"),\r\n                        \"path\": headers.get(\":path\") or headers.get(\"path\"),\r\n                        \"authority\": headers.get(\":authority\") or headers.get(\"authority\"),\r\n                    }\r\n            elif ft == FRAME_DATA:\r\n                size = len(getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\"))\r\n                bytes_c2s_by_stream[stream_id] = bytes_c2s_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0) + size\r\n        for stream_id, ft, frame, offset in s2c_frames:\r\n            if ft == FRAME_HEADERS and stream_id != 0:\r\n                block = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                headers = _decode_header_block(block)\r\n                if \":status\" in headers or \"status\" in headers:\r\n                    try:\r\n                        response_by_stream[stream_id] = {\r\n                            \"offset\": offset,\r\n                            \"status_code\": int(headers.get(\":status\") or headers.get(\"status\", \"0\")),\r\n                        }\r\n                    except ValueError:\r\n                        pass\r\n            elif ft == FRAME_DATA:\r\n"
    },
    "4:VARINT": 6139
  }
}
